prompt:
Goal: Create a cinematic vertical sports poster for Argentina national football team, styled like a premium agency-level FIFA World Cup campaign artwork.

Canvas: Portrait poster, 2:3 aspect ratio, dark dramatic stadium atmosphere, ultra-detailed photorealistic compositing, high contrast, gold and sky-blue color palette, smoky haze, sparks, confetti, and floodlights.

Main composition: Show exactly 10 male football players arranged in three stacked rows, all facing forward with stern heroic body language. Their faces should be intentionally anonymized with soft rectangular blur masks covering the face area. Top row: 1 central captain figure standing tallest, wearing jersey number 10 with the name Messi and a black captain armband. Middle row: 4 players, left to right: number 11 Di Maria, number 20 Mac Allister, number 8 E. Fernandez, number 7 De Paul. Front row: 5 players, left to right: number 3 Tagliafico, number 13 Romero, center goalkeeper number 23 Martinez wearing a black goalkeeper kit and holding a football with blue gloves, number 19 Otamendi, number 26 Molina. Keep the player count exactly 10.

Uniform details: Use Argentina-style white and sky-blue vertical striped jerseys with black shoulder stripes, gold tournament badge at center chest, AFA-style crest with three stars, black or dark numbering, and subtle sweat, fabric texture, and realistic shadows. The goalkeeper wears a dark navy/black kit with gold accents and matching crest.

Background: A huge waving Argentina flag fills the upper background, with a bright glowing sunburst halo behind the top central player’s head. Place a massive illuminated stadium bowl behind the players, packed with tiny crowd lights, fog, blue smoke, and golden particle effects.

Logos and marks: Top left place a gold AFA-style crest with three stars. Top right place a gold World Cup trophy icon with stacked text reading exactly: “FIFA WORLD CUP 2026”. Bottom center include a small gold AFA-style crest, a vertical divider, and an Adidas-style three-stripe mark.

Text content: At the bottom, create a huge distressed condensed block headline in off-white reading exactly: “THE WEIGHT OF GLORY.” Beneath it, add a smaller spaced subtitle reading exactly: “DEFENDING THE CROWN IN 2026”, with “DEFENDING” in sky blue and “THE CROWN IN 2026” in warm gold. Under that, add location text in small white spaced capitals: “UNITED STATES · CANADA · MEXICO”. At the very bottom, add tiny spaced gold text: “THREE STARS. ONE DESTINY.”

Style constraints: Make it look like an official epic football movie poster, not a flat graphic. Use realistic lighting, sharp jersey details, cinematic grading, metallic gold typography, grunge texture on the headline, symmetrical team hierarchy, no extra players, no extra text, no watermark.
